feat.name: Incredible Construct Companion
feat.text: Thanks to your continual tinkering, your construct companion has advanced to an astounding new stage of engineering, enhancing all its attributes. Your construct companion becomes an incredible construct companion.

traits.name: Inventor
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the inventor class.
